en_title: Has $80 GTA 6 Opened the Door to More Expensive Games? Analysts Respond
cn_title: 《GTA6》80美元(约合人民币545元)定价会带涨游戏价格吗？
subtitle: 看点来了
opus_summary: Rockstar确认《GTA6》标准版售价80美元(约合人民币545元)，引发行业对游戏涨价的讨论。多位分析师向IGN表示。

paragraphs.en: Rockstar has ended months of speculation by confirming that GTA 6 will cost $80 — a higher price point previously also tested by Nintendo with its Switch 2 launch title Mario Kart World.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar结束了数月的猜测，确认《GTA6》售价为80美元(约合人民币545元)——这一更高定价此前任天堂也曾在Switch 2首发游戏《马力欧卡丁车世界》上尝试过。

paragraphs.en: While lower than the $100 GTA 6 price point some industry watchers had predicted (though, of course, there is that $100 Ultimate Edition too), $80 is still a high watermark for video game pricing, and one that many analysts feel we'll now likely see more of. But how prevalent will $80 games become, and can other video game publishers really claim their games are worth it compared to the behemoth that is Grand Theft Auto 6?
paragraphs.cn: 虽然低于部分行业观察者预测的100美元(约合人民币681元)（当然，也确实有100美元(约合人民币681元)的终极版），但80美元(约合人民币545元)依然是游戏定价的新高，许多分析师认为我们今后可能会看到更多这样的价格。但80美元(约合人民币545元)游戏会变得多普遍？其他游戏发行商真的能声称自己的游戏能与《GTA6》这样的巨兽相提并论，从而值这个价吗？

paragraphs.en: "We see much more variability in launch pricing now than we have seen historically in the video game industry," Circana senior director and analyst Mat Piscatella told IGN. "But I'm sure more games will start pushing towards the higher end of the price spectrum, especially given everything happening in the macro-economic environment. When Call of Duty 2 released at $59.99 on the Xbox 360 in 2005, other games quickly followed. Would these other games have gotten there at some point, anyways, even without Call of Duty 2? Sure. But having a big game prove the viability of the price point can help make pricing decisions a bit easier."
paragraphs.cn: Circana高级总监兼分析师Mat Piscatella告诉IGN：「现在游戏首发定价的波动比我们以往在游戏行业所见的要大得多。但我相信，会有更多游戏开始向价格区间的高端靠拢，尤其是考虑到宏观经济环境中发生的一切。2005年《使命召唤2》以59.99美元(约合人民币409元)在XBOX 360上发售，其他游戏很快就跟进了。即使没有《使命召唤2》，这些游戏总有一天也会涨到这个价吗？当然。但有一款大作证明了这个价格点的可行性，无疑会让定价决策变得更容易一些。」

paragraphs.en: Not every game is getting more expensive, of course, as Nintendo has shown with its flexible pricing strategy for first-party Switch 2 games. While Mario Kart World was $80, its smaller-scale exclusives such as Star Fox and Yoshi and the Mysterious Book sell for less. Still, there's a feeling it has opened the floodgates to $80 launches, seen when buying the Switch 2 versions of Zelda: Breath of the Wild and Tears of the Kingdom, or the Switch 2 version of Elden Ring.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，并非所有游戏都在变贵，正如任天堂展示的第一方Switch 2游戏灵活定价策略。虽然《马力欧卡丁车世界》定价80美元(约合人民币545元)，但其规模较小的独占作品如《星际火狐》和《耀西与不可思议的图鉴》售价更低。然而，仍有一种感觉，它已经打开了80美元(约合人民币545元)首发游戏的大门，就像购买Switch 2版的《塞尔达传说：旷野之息》和《王国之泪》，或者Switch 2版本的《艾尔登法环》时看到的那样。

paragraphs.en: "The $80 price tag for GTA 6 makes charging higher prices much easier for other AAA game publishers," agreed Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of consultancy firm Kantan Games, "exactly because it is such a big release.
paragraphs.cn: 咨询公司Kantan Games的CEOSerkan Toto博士表示赞同：「《GTA6》的80美元(约合人民币545元)定价让其他3A游戏发行商更容易提高价格，正是因为它是如此重磅的作品。」

paragraphs.en: "Take-Two did it before," Toto continued, referencing the $10 increase to $70 video games seen at the start of the PS5 and Xbox Series X/S era for the NBA 2K series that has now become an industry standard. "Why should it not become the trailblazer for the industry again? Jumping from $70 to $80 is a 14.3% price increase, which is quite a lot. It will very much depend on the game, but I can easily see some marquee titles going for this price, perhaps even this year, too."
paragraphs.cn: Toto继续说道：「Take-Two以前就这么做过。」他指的是在PS5和XBOX Series时代初期，《NBA 2K》系列从60美元(约合人民币409元)涨价10美元(约合人民币68元)至70美元(约合人民币477元)，如今这已成为行业标准。「为什么它不能再次成为行业的开拓者？从70美元(约合人民币477元)涨到80美元(约合人民币545元)，涨幅达14.3%，幅度相当大。具体还得看游戏，但我很容易想象一些重磅作品会采用这个价格，甚至可能就在今年。」

paragraphs.en: "The $80 price for the Standard Edition is in line with our expectations and comes after multiple publishers have experimented with this price point with varying degrees of success," noted Daniel Ahmad, Director of Research & Insights at Niko Partners. "Given current macroeconomic conditions, only certain games and publishers can confidently price a title at $80, and Rockstar Games is one of them as players understand the value they'll receive from the title. We expect strong preorders, with day one sell-through exceeding $1.2 billion globally."
paragraphs.cn: Niko Partners研究总监Daniel Ahmad指出：「标准版80美元(约合人民币545元)的定价符合我们的预期，此前已有多家发行商尝试过这一价位，成败不一。以目前的宏观经济环境，只有特定游戏和发行商能把标准版定在80美元(约合人民币545元)，而Rockstar Games正是其中之一，因为玩家知道自己能从这款游戏中获得怎样的价值。我们预计预购会非常强劲，发售当日全球实际销售收入将突破12亿美元(约合人民币82亿元)。」

paragraphs.en: What else might sell for $80 this year? With Nintendo already flirting with the premium price tag, it perhaps would be unsurprising to see its big new Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake land at $80. And what about other Xbox-published titles such as Fable, with the division now seeking increased profitability?
paragraphs.cn: 今年还会有哪些游戏卖到80美元(约合人民币545元)？任天堂已经在试探更高的定价，它的《塞尔达传说：时之笛》大型重制版如果也卖80美元(约合人民币545元)，或许不会令人惊讶。另外，像《神鬼寓言》这类由微软其他部门发行的游戏呢？该部门如今正追求更高利润率。

paragraphs.en: "The pricing lands cheaper than many of the rumors," said Piers Harding-Rolls, games industry analyst at Ampere Analysis, referencing previous speculation that GTA 6 could sell for $90 or even $100. "I expected there to be some premium for GTA 6 because of its stature and if any game can charge $79.99 without a major backlash, it’s GTA. Many players that pre-order will opt for the Ultimate Edition at $99.99 meaning that the ‘$100 GTA 6’ is a reality. What is perhaps more of a surprise is the lack of early access for the Ultimate Edition – a common strategy to drive buyers to higher priced editions of the game. Also, there is no news on a Collector's Edition, but that might come later."
paragraphs.cn: Ampere Analysis游戏行业分析师Piers Harding-Rolls提到之前的传言——有猜测称GTA6可能卖90甚至100美元(约合人民币681元)，并表示：「这次定价其实比很多传闻要低。我原先就预计GTA6会有溢价，毕竟它的分量摆在那里。如果说哪款游戏敢卖79.99美元(约合人民币545元)还不会引发大规模反弹，那只能是GTA。很多预购玩家会选择99.99美元(约合人民币681元)的终极版，所以『100美元(约合人民币681元)的GTA6』已经成为现实。但比较让人意外的是，终极版居然没有抢先体验权——这本来是把玩家推向更高价位版本的常见手段。另外，目前也没有典藏版的消息，不过可能后续会有。」

paragraphs.en: Of course, Rockstar's $80 price for GTA 6 is just the game's upfront cost. The company will also know it is likely going to see far more value from each owner of the game over time as it launches its next iteration of GTA Online. "Even today, nearly 13 years after the launch of GTA V Online, the Grand Theft Auto franchise generates more than $800 million per year in net revenue for Take-Two," Ahmad noted. "In fact, Rockstar is offering a free month of its GTA+ subscription to everyone that preorders the game, to get players into the online experience."
paragraphs.cn: 当然，Rockstar为GTA6定下的80美元(约合人民币545元)只是游戏的前期售价。公司也很清楚，随着下一版《GTA Online》上线，每位玩家带来的长期价值会远超这个数字。Daniel Ahmad还指出：「即便在《GTA V Online》上线近13年后的今天，侠盗猎车手 系列每年仍为Take-Two贡献超过8亿美元(约合人民币54亿元)的净收入。事实上，Rockstar正在向所有预购游戏的玩家免费赠送一个月的GTA+ 会员，就是为了把玩家引入线上体验。」

paragraphs.en: Publishers will need to pick their battles when eyeing up that $80 price point, Harding-Rolls continued — as video game fans are well aware that not every title will be able to justify it. Even Nintendo has seen its choice of $80 for Mario Kart World questioned, following debate over the benefits of the game's open world.
paragraphs.cn: Harding-Rolls接着表示，发行商在觊觎80美元(约合人民币545元)价位时必须有所取舍——因为游戏玩家心里很清楚，并不是每款作品都配得上这个价钱。就连任天堂为《马力欧卡丁车世界》定下的80美元(约合人民币545元)，也在围绕开放世界玩法价值的争论中受到质疑。

paragraphs.en: "There are certain games that can get away with charging more than the standard $69.99 and GTA 6 is one of them," Harding-Rolls continued. "Mario Kart World also pulled it off. Publishers will be aware that some games get a pass at this level while others are likely to face a consumer backlash. As such, I don’t think this means that all AAA games will be priced at $79.99 for the standard edition moving forward. Many players spend more than that on Deluxe and Ultimate editions anyway to get early access to games or unique in-game items, so for enthusiasts the standard edition pricing is not a factor."
paragraphs.cn: Harding-Rolls继续说：「确实有些游戏敢定得比69.99美元(约合人民币477元)的标准更高，GTA6就是其中之一，而《马力欧卡丁车世界》也成功做到了。发行商都明白，有的游戏定这个价能过关，有的则很可能引发玩家反弹。因此，我不认为这意味着今后所有3A大作的标准版都会标价79.99美元(约合人民币545元)。反正许多玩家在豪华版或终极版上花的钱早就超过这个数了，为的是抢先体验或独占道具，对核心粉丝来说，标准版定价其实并不是关键因素。」

paragraphs.en: Joost van Dreunen, video game industry researcher and professor at the NYU Stern School of Business, argued that charging $80 for a video game is something that publishers will have to "earn" the right to do, likely reserving the price point for marquee blockbusters.
paragraphs.cn: 电子游戏行业研究员、纽约大学斯特恩商学院教授Joost van Dreunen认为，发行商必须「赢得」对游戏定价80美元(约合人民币545元)的权利，这个价位可能只会留给重磅大作。

paragraphs.en: "In the current economic environment, a $80 price tag is earned, not given," van Dreunen said. "Charging that much for the vanilla version of a game is only justifiable for well-established franchises capable of setting the tone culturally. It also widens the gap between S-tier game makers like Take-Two, Nintendo, and EA, and everyone else. I expect that especially those publishers like Ubisoft that are already feeling the burn will have a harder time in the coming period."
paragraphs.cn: van Dreunen表示：「在当前经济环境下，80美元(约合人民币545元)的定价是靠实力赢得的，不是凭空得来的。只有那些能在文化上引领风潮的成熟系列，才配得上标准版卖这个价。这也进一步拉大了Take-Two、任天堂、EA等顶级游戏厂商与其他所有公司的差距。我认为，尤其是像育碧这样已经压力重重的发行商，未来一段日子会更难过。」

paragraphs.en: Of course, just because analysts might say that only some publishers will succeed at the $80 price point, doesn't mean publishers will be put off from trying their luck.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，分析师认为只有部分发行商能成功驾驭80美元(约合人民币545元)的定价，但这并不代表其他发行商会望而却步、不去碰运气。

paragraphs.en: "I think a lot of publishers are about to learn that the hard way," Rhys Elliot, head of market analysis at Alinea Analytics, said. "GTA 6 has more pricing power than any game on earth, and it still didn't go above $80. If the biggest release in the industry's history looked at the ceiling and chose not to break it, that should tell everyone else the ceiling is real, and they’ll smack their head on it. The danger is that publishers read 'GTA is $80' as a green light and push their own run-of-the-mill or new-IP games to $80, when the lesson is the opposite: even GTA didn't think it could go higher.
paragraphs.cn: Alinea Analytics市场分析主管Rhys Elliot表示：「我觉得很多发行商很快就会吃这个亏。《GTA6》拥有地球上最强的定价权，但它的售价都没超过80美元(约合人民币545元)。如果业界史上最大的发售作品看看天花板后选择不捅破，那其他人就该明白，天花板真的存在，而且撞上去会很疼。危险在于，发行商会把‘GTA卖80美元(约合人民币545元)’解读成放行信号，然后也把自己那些平庸之作或新IP提到80美元(约合人民币545元)，但事实恰恰相反：连GTA都不觉得自己能定更高的价。」

paragraphs.en: "The handful of publishers who can charge $80 base share one trait: a captive, price-inelastic audience that won't shop around or wait for a discount. That's why Nintendo gets away with it, its players are locked in, first-party, and famously discount-averse. PlayStation could probably manage it on a marquee first-party title. FromSoftware has the brand strength to do it, even if they've historically priced more modestly than they could (Elden Ring is $80 on Switch, though). Maybe the big yearly sports games as well.
paragraphs.cn: 「少数能把基础版卖到80美元(约合人民币545元)的发行商都有一个共同点：他们拥有忠实且价格不敏感的用户群体，这些人不会货比三家或等着打折。正因如此，任天堂能做到这一点，它的玩家被牢牢锁定在第一方生态里，而且出了名的不爱等折扣。PlayStation或许也能在重磅第一方作品上做到这点。From Software有足够的品牌号召力去定这个价，尽管他们历来定价比应有的要克制（不过Switch版《艾尔登法环》倒确实是80美元(约合人民币545元)）。也许那些大型年货体育游戏也能办到。」

paragraphs.en: "Almost nobody else has that. For everyone else, the maths is brutal in that raising your base to $80 just sheds the price-sensitive buyers you can't afford to lose in this economy. That's why I reckon most publishers will, correctly, stick to a $70 base with an $80-$100 premium edition layered on top, early access, a few cosmetic perks, and stuff. That model lets the FOMO-prone superfans pay more for early access while everyone else pays $70, or waits for the inevitable discount. You capture the whales without raising the floor on the people most likely to walk.
paragraphs.cn: 「除此以外，几乎没人能做到。对其他所有人来说，这笔账很残酷：把基础版提到80美元(约合人民币545元)，只会劝退那些在当前经济环境下你根本流失不起的价格敏感型买家。因此，我认为多数发行商会明智地选择继续把基础版定在70美元(约合人民币477元)，再往上叠加80-100美元(约合人民币681元)的豪华版，配点抢先体验、外观奖励之类的东西。这样一来，担心错过的铁粉可以多花钱提前玩到，其他人要么付70美元(约合人民币477元)，要么等打折。既抓住了大R玩家，又没提高那些容易流失用户的门槛。」

paragraphs.en: "The publishers to watch out for are the ones who mistake GTA's runway for their own. Their more ordinary games won't carry $80, and the sales data will tell them so within a quarter."
paragraphs.cn: 「需要警惕的，是那些误把《GTA》的成功之路当成自己成功之路的发行商。他们更普通的游戏撑不起80美元(约合人民币545元)的定价，而销量数据终将让这一现实明朗——往往只需一个季度。」

paragraphs.en: For more, check out Everything Rockstar Announced and Confirmed on GTA 6 Preorder Day .
paragraphs.cn: 了解更多，请查看Rockstar在《GTA6》预购日公布与确认的全部内容。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或者在Bluesky上找到他。

translated_terms.Yoshi and the Mysterious Book: 耀西与不可思议的图鉴
